summary: Iteration 19: FATF High Risk Country Flag Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All UI flows verified: FATF Grey List badge shows on customer detail page, GL mini badge shows in customer list, Risk Score Breakdown shows Country Risk +10, FATF warning banner displays correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render

passed_tests: Login with shyam@rudrik.io / Assword@0231
GET /api/fatf/lists returns black_list (IR, KP, MM) and grey_list (25 countries)
GET /api/fatf/check/KP returns black_list with risk_score_impact 25
GET /api/fatf/check/IR returns black_list with risk_score_impact 25
GET /api/fatf/check/MM returns black_list with risk_score_impact 25
GET /api/fatf/check/PK returns grey_list with risk_score_impact 10
GET /api/fatf/check/NG returns grey_list with risk_score_impact 10
GET /api/fatf/check/TR returns grey_list with risk_score_impact 10
GET /api/fatf/check/IN returns standard with risk_score_impact 0
GET /api/fatf/check/US returns standard with risk_score_impact 0
Country code check is case insensitive (pk, Pk, PK all work)
Unknown country code returns standard classification
POST /api/customers with nationality PK auto-flags country_risk as grey_list with risk_level medium
POST /api/customers with nationality KP auto-flags country_risk as black_list with risk_level high and cdd_tier edd
POST /api/customers with nationality IN has standard country_risk with risk_level low
POST /api/customers/{id}/refresh-country-risk updates customer's FATF classification
POST /api/customers/{invalid_id}/refresh-country-risk returns 404
GET /api/customers/{id} enriches country_risk if not present
Customer 'Amit Bhatia' (PK) found with country_risk grey_list
Customer detail page shows FATF GREY LIST badge next to name
Customer detail page shows FATF Increased Monitoring warning banner with 'Pakistan — +10 risk pts'
Risk Score Breakdown shows Country Risk +10 for grey list customer
Customers list page shows GL badge next to grey-listed customer names
Dashboard loads correctly
Screening page works with Demo Mode badge
DigiLocker verification card displays correctly

Grey list customers automatically get risk_level=medium
